summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnHub MVP - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core features working with JWT session persistence issue identified

integration_issues.issue: Sessions expire very quickly (within minutes), causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot navigate between pages without re-authenticating frequently

passed_tests: Landing page renders with hero section, features grid, and CTA buttons
Registration flow: navigate to /register, fill form, submit, redirects to /dashboard
Login flow: navigate to /login, fill form, submit, redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard shows stats (lessons, courses, badges, XP) and quick links
Code Sandbox: Monaco editor loads, can type code and click RUN, shows output correctly
Logout button works and redirects to login
All 24 Backend APIs working: auth, courses, progress, badges, planner, forum, sandbox, AI
Dark theme with 3-color palette (#0A0A0A, #FFFFFF, #FACC15) implemented correctly
Responsive design and proper data-testid attributes for testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT token persistence issue - sessions expire too quickly causing frequent logouts. Consider increasing token expiration time or implementing proper token refresh mechanism in frontend. This is blocking full frontend testing and user experience.
